revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-360

A signal in which the physical quantity used for transmission varies in an unquantized way according to the value of a physical quantity of the same or different nature.

Reference: I.E.C. (extract)

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Analogue signal}}
